title: “when an update is created” not firing on creation of update.
excerpt:
I have created an automation using “when an update is created”. 
I am trying to set a date and a status. 
It only works if you reply to the update, it does not work when the update is created.

posts.author: thehousemanager (Cat)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Cat! Does the automation activity log for this recipe show any pending or failed runs?

Are you manually posting these updates on the item that is not triggering the automation recipe as expected?
